creator: ddrinnon@cdor.net
text:
The port security/openvas fails to build in Poudriere on amd64 12.4-Release:

[ 48% 38/79] /usr/local/libexec/ccache/cc -DHAVE_LIBKSBA -DHAVE_NETSNMP -DOPENVASLIB_VERSION=\"22.4.0\" -DOPENVAS_CONF=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas/openvas.conf\" -DOPENVAS_FEED_LOCK_PATH=\"/var/lib/openvas/feed-update.lock\" -DOPENVAS_GPG_BASE_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_NASL_VERSION=\"22.4.0\" -DOPENVAS_STATE_DIR=\"/var/lib/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_SYSCONF_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -Dopenvas_nasl_shared_EXPORTS -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gvm -I/usr/local/include/p11-kit-1 -I/usr/local/include/uuid -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DLARGEFILE_SOURCE=1                                 -std=c11                                 -Wall                                 -Wextra                                 -Werror                                 -Wpedantic                                 -Wmissing-prototypes                                 -Wshadow                                 -Wsequence-point                                 -D_BSD_SOURCE                                 -D_ISOC11_SOURCE                                 -D_SVID_SOURCE                                 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -Wall -Wextra -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -DNDEBUG -Wformat -Wformat-security -fPIC -MD -MT nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o -MF nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o.d -o nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.0/nasl/nasl_grammar.tab.c
FAILED: nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o 
/usr/local/libexec/ccache/cc -DHAVE_LIBKSBA -DHAVE_NETSNMP -DOPENVASLIB_VERSION=\"22.4.0\" -DOPENVAS_CONF=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas/openvas.conf\" -DOPENVAS_FEED_LOCK_PATH=\"/var/lib/openvas/feed-update.lock\" -DOPENVAS_GPG_BASE_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_NASL_VERSION=\"22.4.0\" -DOPENVAS_STATE_DIR=\"/var/lib/openvas\" -DOPENVAS_SYSCONF_DIR=\"/usr/local/etc/openvas\" -Dopenvas_nasl_shared_EXPORTS -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gvm -I/usr/local/include/p11-kit-1 -I/usr/local/include/uuid -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -DLARGEFILE_SOURCE=1                                 -std=c11                                 -Wall                                 -Wextra                                 -Werror                                 -Wpedantic                                 -Wmissing-prototypes                                 -Wshadow                                 -Wsequence-point                                 -D_BSD_SOURCE                                 -D_ISOC11_SOURCE                                 -D_SVID_SOURCE                                 -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -Wall -Wextra -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -DNDEBUG -Wformat -Wformat-security -fPIC -MD -MT nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o -MF nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o.d -o nasl/CMakeFiles/openvas_nasl_shared.dir/nasl_grammar.tab.c.o -c /wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.0/nasl/nasl_grammar.tab.c
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/openvas/work/openvas-scanner-22.4.0/nasl/nasl_grammar.y:340:17: error: variable 'error_counter' set but not used [-Werror,-Wunused-but-set-variable]
          int * error_counter;
                ^
1 error generated.
ninja: build stopped: subcommand failed.
*** Error code 1
